title: Natural Coir Mat Printed Patterned Dirt Trapper Indoor/Outdoor Door Mat Welcome Mat Non-Slip PVC Backed Doormat 60cm x 40cm (Rainbow Unicorn)
features: Material: Our door mats are made from heavy duty eco friendly natural coir crafted from coconut fibres. The back of the doormat is made from hard wearing non-slip black PVC which helps trap water and protect interior carpets.
Size: 60cm x 40cm + 1.8cm Thickness | These Doormats can be used both inside or outside your home, on carpet, hardwood floor, tiles, tarmac, concrete and pave block.

Easy to clean: Beat away dirt and mud, then brush through with water; lie flat to dry and flip over to dry both sides thoroughly. We advise not to use pressure washers when cleaning as this can fade or remove the printed patterns.

Suitability: These coir mats are suitable for indoor & outdoor use. They will suit any entrance way / hallway / garden door mat / front door mat. These mats are: Sustainable / Hardwearing / Water resistant / Weather Proof & Universal.
Pattern: Various unique & pretty designs printed on Natural Coir with various colour and patterns. As shown on real life images.
description: Coir Door Interior/Exterior Household Mat - Anti-Slip Entrance Patterned Door MatMade From Natural CoirHighly Absorbent Strong & DurableSize: Rectangle: 40(W) x 60(L)cmThese Indoor/Outdoor Household Coir Mats come in a variety of unique patterns and are heavy duty, designed for profound use, inside or outside of the home!Welcome your guests in style, with many designs to choose from...The natural, stiff, tufted coir fibres effectively capture debris from muddy shoes, before entering the home.Shield your flooring and rid-off dirt beneath your foot ware into your home with this intelligently designed doormat.Long lasting heavy duty anti-slip resistant base to prevent skidding on floor surface.Backed with anti-slip rubber, to ensure your mat stays securely in position.Non slip rubber backing which prevents dirt from being carried through the house & damaging your floors.Azo free paint (lead free) hand printed on eco-friendly natural coconut fibre door mat.Please note that all images are for illustration purposes only, actual item colour may look slightly darker or lighter due to a number of factors such as the flash, lighting, contrast of your computer screen, Photoshop etc. We have tried to describe the colours as best as we can, Please take this into consideration when purchasing from us. There are possibilities that computer monitors can vary so your monitor/device may show the colour slightly different but we try to give our best.
